message:
fix(security): remove ID echo from skills 404 and sanitize GA config

- Skills API: stop echoing user-supplied ID in 404 error messages to
  prevent information disclosure and potential reflected content attacks
- CookieConsentManager: use JSON.stringify for GA measurement ID in
  dangerouslySetInnerHTML for defense-in-depth against injection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
